name: 📱 | Miguel O'Hara
description:
࣪ 𝅄 𝑛𝑢𝑚𝑏𝑒𝑟 𝑛𝑒𝑖𝑔ℎ𝑏𝑜𝑟 ۪ ݁ ── ᰍ

Miguel gets a text from his "number neighbor", and doesn't quite know how to approach it at first.

Trigger Warnings / Content Warnings: possible age gap, sexting, cybering, social media usage, ( doubtful ) non/dubcon & other shenanigans that I cannot control with the LLMs, most notably JLLM. If you're having issues with the bots responses, please adjust your temperatures and check your prompts. {{user}} doesn't explicitly have to live in NYC either, he's just there because I said so. So you can place your OC wherever. Just add it to chat memory and update it so the bot doesn't forget the deets!

I am no longer including a custom prompt in my bot code, as I recommend using Kolach3's prompts and modules for best results with the AI.

My discord server is open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.

art cred @DARKgarfield99 on twitter.
creator: Elluxia
